# Teckon™ Quality Spares
> Premium Hydraulic Parts & Spares for Heavy Machinery manufactured by Shreeji Hydraulics.

## Core Information
- **Manufacturer:** Shreeji Hydraulics (based in Rajkot, Gujarat, India). Established in 2000.
- **Certifications:** ISO 9001:2015 Certified.
- **Specializations:** High-quality aftermarket spares and components matching OEM specifications for JCB, Terex, Caterpillar (CAT), Hitachi, L770, Tata JD, and major earthmoving/construction equipment brands.
- **Main Products:** Hydraulic cylinders, pump assemblies, seal kits, control valves, tipper systems, breakers, and high-tensile pins & bushes.

## Site Structure & Key Pages
- [Home Page](https://teckon.vercel.app/): Brand overview, core advantages, interactive supply map, top products, client testimonials, and latest blog posts.
- [About Us](https://teckon.vercel.app/about): Company history, 25+ years industry experience, detailed manufacturing capabilities, VMC/CNC precision facilities, and founder profiles (Alpesh Patel, J.C. Patel).
- [Products Catalog](https://teckon.vercel.app/products): Browse full inventory of hydraulic parts filterable by manufacturer categories (JCB, Terex, CAT, Excavators, Breakers & Tippers, etc.).
- [Quality Systems](https://teckon.vercel.app/quality): ISO 9001:2015 certification details, material testing, precision machining tolerancing, and inspection procedures.
- [Technical Blog](https://teckon.vercel.app/blog): Maintenance guides, diagnostic tips for hydraulic pumps, excavator seal kit installation tutorials, and parts selection guides.
- [Contact & Inquiries](https://teckon.vercel.app/contact): Secure parts inquiry form, direct phone contacts, office address, and live Google Maps location.
